Data Input

Upload synchronized Left and Right wrist sensor data. Both files must belong to the same patient and task.

Left Wrist Data

Drag & drop or browse

e.g. 035_TouchNose_LeftWrist.txt

Right Wrist Data

Drag & drop or browse

e.g. 035_TouchNose_RightWrist.txt
